The series explores practical dental care, prevention, comfort-focused treatment, and the everyday habits that support healthy smiles for children, adults, and seniors. Built around the spirit of Family Dentistry, the show blends expert guidance with friendly, reassuring conversations that make dental care feel approachable rather than intimidating.Each episode is designed to educate, comfort, and empower listeners with simple, useful advice they can apply at home and discuss with their dentist. The objective of the series is to strengthen trust, encourage regular check-ups, and show how modern dentistry can support long-term wellness, confidence, and quality of life for the whole family. It also reflects the practice’s community-minded approach and its focus on prevention, comfort, and care across generations.

title: Vibin' With B Podcast
author: BRENDA CERVANTES
description: Vibn’ with B is a safe space to slow down, reflect, and connect. Through meaningful conversations, personal stories, and honest reflections, B talks about life, faith, growth, and everything in between. This podcast is all about vibing through the highs and lows. No filters, no pretending—just conversations that inspire, challenge, and remind you who you are. B keeps it authentic and unapologetically real. Come as you are—this is your place to breathe, think, and vibe.

title: Mind, Muscle & Music Podcast
author: Phil Hawkins
description:
Welcome to the Mind, Muscle & Music Podcast — where we explore the rhythms of life through wellness, nutrition, fitness, mindset, and music.


One of us is a fitness trainer who loves music. The other is a musician trying to get in better shape. Together, we explore the intersection of mind, muscle, and music.

From fitness and nutrition to creativity, stress, recovery, relationships, and work-life balance, no topic is off limits. Our goal is to have real conversations about living healthier, thinking clearer, and finding more balance in a busy world.

Join us as we ask the questions everyone is thinking about—and search for answers together.

title: The Living Pure Podcast (video)
author: Marsha Brown
description: Living Pure is a podcast by Marsha Brown that explores authentic worship, healthy relationships, mental and spiritual well-being, and living out your God-given purpose. Through biblical insight, practical encouragement, original music, and reflections from Marsha’s books and blogs, each episode invites you to pursue wholeness in every area of life. Join us as we pursue pure faith, a renewed mind, meaningful relationships, purposeful living, and lasting hope, because God cares about every part of who you are.

title: God's secrets to finding peace on earth
author: Jason Paech
description: This podcast is a journey into the heart of peace—not as a fleeting feeling, but as a firm, actionable reality. Drawing from my book, God Secrets to finding Peace on Earth, I am sharing how to move beyond merely wishing for peace and instead learn how to live in it every single day.

title: LOWKEY with Troble
author: Troble
description:
LOWKEY
The podcast where we say the stuff everybody thinks… but nobody says out loud.
Hosted by Troble, LOWKEY is a personal stories podcast about the things we don't admit at parties. Self-sabotage. Staying too long in rooms that hurt us. Being everyone's emergency contact but never anyone's patient. The quiet, uncomfortable truths we swallow every day finally said out loud.
Each episode feels like a late-night voice note from a friend who refuses to lie to you. Dark humor. Long pauses. Real honesty. No guests. No scripts polished to sound perfect. Just raw, solo reflections on life, relationships, mental health, and the parts of ourselves we usually keep hidden.
If you've ever felt called out by your own thoughts at 2 a.m. this podcast is for you.
New episodes every week or two 
🎙 LOWKEY — We're all figuring it out.

title: H20 Hustle Podcast
author: Jamel Wofford
description: This is a podcast that highlights leadership, faith and character as well as my journey through the water and wastewater industry

title: Samantha's Podcast
author: Samantha
description: Hanime is an online platform dedicated to anime enthusiasts, offering a simple way to discover and explore a wide variety of animated series and movies. From timeless classics to the latest releases, it provides an organized and user-friendly experience for fans looking to enjoy Japanese animation and stay updated with new content.

title: Where Madness Lies
author: Aaron Webman
description:
The show explores the madness that drives the numerous fascinating people I'm lucky to have in my life. The name of the show is based on the quote in Don Quixote: 
"When life itself seems lunatic, who knows where madness lies? Too much sanity may be madness, and maddest of all is to see life as it is and not as it should be."
One of the reasons we're excited to film these conversations is so that we can always look back and remember the amazing people, ideas and pearls of wisdom that are currently in our world.

title: Why do many people prefer to shop masala
author: roopakstores
description:
Have you noticed how more people today are searching for healthy spices and traditional masalas online instead of visiting local stores?
https://www.roopakstores.com/blog/why-do-many-people-prefer-to-shop-masala-online-for-healthy-items

title: Hillcriminaldefense
author: The Hill Law Firm
description: If you have recently been arrested for a felony, misdemeanor, or federal charge, you undoubtedly understand the seriousness of the allegation.s made against you and are uncertain about your future. You need a criminal defense attorney with a track record of success, and we are here to help! With 50 Years of combined experience, The Hill Law Firm is your best chance at a great defense. For your FREE case evaluation, contact us today!

title: The Healing Roadmap with Sonia Ellery
author: Sonia Ellery Naturopath & Intuitive Healer
description:
Welcome to The Healing Roadmap.

I'm Sonia Ellery, a naturopath, herbalist and intuitive healer. Every week we explore the connections between gut health, hormones, fatigue, autoimmune conditions, the nervous system and emotional wellbeing.

If you've ever felt overwhelmed by conflicting health advice or wondered where to start, this podcast is here to simplify the science, support your intuition and remind you that healing happens layer by layer.

Together we'll make sense of your symptoms, share practical strategies and explore a whole-person approach to restoring health, vitality and hope.

title: Be Security Aware: Cybersecurity for People Who Aren't Tech People
author: BeSecurityAware.com
description: Be Security Aware breaks down the scams, hacks, and privacy threats that target regular people — not IT professionals. From AI poisoning and identity theft to deepfakes and connected car hacking, each episode covers a real threat and exactly what you can do about it. No jargon. No lectures. Just the information you need to protect yourself, your family, and your money. New episodes and full articles at besecurityaware.com.

title: Café Berlin
author: Ian Oxnevad, Lilla Nóra Kiss
description: "Café Berlin" brings big global questions down to earth. Hosted by Ian Oxnevad and Lilla Nóra Kiss, the podcast explores how global competition for security, technology, and energy shapes the future of universities, civic life, and the free world. Each episode features sharp conversations with leading scholars, policymakers, and national security experts about the ideas and conflicts reshaping higher education—and why they matter far beyond campus.

title: Architect the Future
author: BCG Platinion
description:
How will AI reshape the enterprise of the future? From scanning items at the grocery store to routing airplanes across the globe — technology is the central nervous system of our world. Now, enterprise AI is rewriting how those systems think: finding patterns, making connections, and reshaping how enterprises operate at a scale we've never seen before. 
Architect the Future brings the enterprise perspective to the AI conversation. Each episode features leaders at the forefront of AI adoption and explores how the technology is transforming business. Across industries, we examine the decisions, systems, and designs shaping the next era of enterprise AI.
What will value creation look like in this new landscape? How can businesses increase quality and efficiency while still prioritizing responsible AI governance? And what does it mean to lead in a time of such big transformation? Architect the Future explores how organizations can navigate rapid AI-driven change with intention and a focus on what’s next. Because the future doesn’t simply happen to us. We build it.
About our Host, Tom Martin:
Tom Martin is the global lead of the AI Platforms Group at BCG Platinion, Boston Consulting Group's technology architecture and large-scale implementation division. He leads a team of solution architects, AI engineers, and technical program managers who design, build, and scale agents and AI platforms for clients across technology, media & telco, consumer & retail, and banking & insurance.
Tom's work spans the full journey from concept to production: AI solution architecture, agent and platform design, model adaptation and fine-tuning for cost and performance at scale, applied research, spec-driven development, and model evaluations that actually matter. He's equally passionate about scaling AI responsibly and cost-effectively — and about making AI understandable for everyone, whether that's a boardroom, a frontline team, or anyone trying to figure out what this technology means for their work and their life.
About BCG Platinion:
BCG Platinion is BCG's specialized tech experts and part of their tech and digital practice.
BCG Platinion delivers end-to-end solutions that transform how our clients work and compete. By embedding advanced technologies spanning cloud, data, AI, and GenAI into core business processes, we empower organizations to accelerate their digital ambitions. Our approach blends strategic excellence with deep technical rigor to unlock sustainable growth and purpose.
BCG Platinion helps clients turn ambitious technology transformations into reality by integrating and managing custom-fit, large-scale architectures that deliver measurable, purpose-driven impact.
Get in Touch:
Want to learn more about how BCG Platinion is working with enterprises to embrace the future with AI? Have an idea for a guest you’d love to hear on our show? Want to learn what it is like to work at BCG Platinion? Or do you have feedback to share about a recent episode? Get in touch at podcasts@bcgplatinion.com. We’d love to hear from you.

title: The Living Seed Collective: A Sanctuary of Sacred Conversations
author: Dr. Brenda Maull
description: The Living Seed Collective is a sanctuary of sacred conversations where stories are honored, lived experiences matter, voices are heard, and hope takes root. Hosted by Dr. Brenda Maull.

title: Live In Faith Everyday
author: Kevin Billins
description: Let Faith in the Lord Be Your Foundation

title: The Brotherly Messenger
author: Brotherly Messenger
description:
The Brotherly Messenger—a safe and inspiring podcast conversation for anyone exploring their spiritual journey and awakening. Here, we dive into what it means to wake up to your true self, find your soul's purpose, and discover lasting inner peace.
This transmission is also for family and friends who want to understand their loved ones better as they awaken. I'll share insights and stories with compassion, in hopes that we can collectively bridge the gap during our unique spiritual journeys.

title: SKITS Podcast
author: El
description:
Welcome to SKITS, the podcast where I, El, take you on an intimate journey through the highs and lows of my life and the traumas that have shaped who I am today. SKITS stands for Stories Keeping Insights Through Survival, and that’s exactly what you’ll find here: raw, unfiltered stories that offer deep insights and lessons from the toughest of times.

Each episode is a candid exploration of personal challenges, resilience, and the transformative power of sharing our truths. Whether you’re seeking solace, understanding, or simply a connection with someone who’s been through it all, SKITS is here to offer support and inspiration.

Join me as I navigate the complexities of trauma and healing, turning pain into strength and struggles into powerful stories of survival. Listen, reflect, and discover that even in our darkest moments, we can find light and hope.

Subscribe now and embark on this journey with me. Let’s transform our stories into sources of strength together.

Perfect for those who seek inspiration, mental health support, and a heartfelt connection.

title: A Gull's Eye View by TorquayTalk
author: Torquay Talk
description: A football show made by Torquay United fans, for Torquay United fans

title: Well Since We're Here!
author: Mr. Gucci
description: "Welcome to 'Well, Since We're Here,' the podcast where we dive into unexpected conversations, explore intriguing topics, and embrace the beauty of spontaneous moments. Join us as we navigate through a world of curious ideas, captivating stories, and thought-provoking discussions. Whether you're here by choice or chance, let's embark on this journey together. After all, who knows where we'll end up – well, since we're here!"wellsinceyourehere@gmail.com for booking/collaborations!

title: Char Stories Podcast
author: StarChar
description: The podcast about Asian Canadian Diaspora. This podcast was started, as an alternative to writing a book, to share the many funny, insightful, and very human experiences I've had growing up Asian in Canada. Follow along as I share what it's like being an Asian Canadian Woman, who works and is a married Mom, and trying to figure it all out.

title: Everything But The Football
author: sdonovan90
description: The football conversation doesn't stop when the match ends. This podcast dives into the world beyond the pitch-exploring sports science, training methods, player mental and physical health, financial rules, governance, and the politics that shape the beautiful game.

title: Neuroscience
author: TheScientist
description: Neuroscience, human behavior, emotional intelligence, brain function, cognitive exploration, and the connection between the mind, technology, learning, and human experience.

title: A1JonSnow
author: Bobby Dolan
description: Audio from A1JonSnow.com

title: Cash for Cars Sydney Insights
author: Alec Johnson
description: Cash for Cars Sydney Insights is your go-to podcast for everything you need to know about selling unwanted vehicles in Sydney. Each episode covers free car removal, instant cash quotes, and eco-friendly vehicle disposal across Sydney and surrounding suburbs. Whether your car is old, damaged, or simply unwanted we show you how to turn it into top cash fast.

title: Dive deeper
author: Brittney Motley
description: Where we dive deeper into topics and perspectives of any conversation of the week !

title: Restaurado y en Ascenso
author: La Buena Podcast Network
description:
Restaurado y en Ascenso es un podcast lleno de corazón sobre la esperanza, la sanación y el
poder de la resiliencia. Los anfitriones Melina y Eddie comparten su viaje personal de restaurar
su matrimonio frente a desafíos aparentemente imposibles, ofreciendo a los oyentes una mirada
auténtica al amor, la fe y la perseverancia. Cada episodio incluye entrevistas inspiradoras con
conferencistas motivacionales y héroes cotidianos que han superado los momentos más difíciles
de la vida. Con un enfoque en la positividad, el ánimo y la apertura emocional, el programa
empodera a los oyentes para enfrentar sus propias dificultades con valentía. Ya sea navegando
relaciones, crecimiento personal o los giros inesperados de la vida, Restaurado y en Ascenso brinda motivación y orientación para ayudarte a levantarte más fuerte cada día.

title: Cosmic Tales
author: Diana
description: Cosmic Tales is a show about the stories written into the night sky. Every constellation has a myth behind it, a culture that named it, and a science that explains it — and most of them are stranger and more compelling than you might expect. Host Diana explores one corner of the sky at a time, moving through Greek tragedy, Indigenous oral tradition, Babylonian astronomy, medieval star catalogs, and the genuinely extreme physics of dying stars, all in the same episode. No telescope required. Just curiosity and a willingness to look up.

title: The Retirement School
author: Bec Sullivan
description: Are you 5-10 years out from retirement in Australia or are you ready right now to take the plunge into retirement? Perhaps you have already retired but aren’t sure if you’ve optimised your finances to get the best mix of enjoying life now and longevity of your funds. The Retirement School takes you through a step by step guide of everything you need to know about money in retirement. It covers topics from superannuation through to retirement income, age pension, downsizing and making sure you estate planning is in order. This is a 12 part series which you can learn at your own pace. We include action plans for each topic and useful links and other resources to help you personalise your retirement journey from a financial perspective.

title: Keys to Revelation
author: MidlandSDA
description: In this dynamic seminar, you will discover more about Bible prophecy and the book of Revelation than you ever imagined. The book of Revelation is filled with mysterious signs, strange beasts, and confusing numbers, but what does it all mean? Are there keys that unlock the mysteries of Revelation for us today? With these keys can we make sense of the book of Revelation? Where is our world headed? Is there hope in these end-time prophecies? Can we find peace for our lives today from the pages of this book? Discover the truth and hope that can be found once you understand this misunderstood book.

title: Another Average Podcast
author: Joey Brown
description:
Join me on my self improvement journey. Weekly topics broken down with practical examples. From flying fighters in the US Air Force to transitioning out of the military and finding new purpose in life. My goal is to help you realize your potential while showing you it's ok to not have it all figured out. It's about the process and lessons learned along the way. I'm just Another Average Joe and this is Another Average Podcast.
I'm glad you're here!
Joey

title: The Posh Pod
author: The Posh Pod
description: Welcome to The Posh Pod — your biweekly dose of femme power, fitness, and fab living. Born in a women-empowerment gym in Boca, where women truly lift each other up, this Podcast blends fitness tips, mindset and self-care rituals, candid interviews, and community stories from the Boca scene. Tune in every other week to Get motivated, feel seen and part of a sisterhood that’s all about strength, confidence, and glow-ups.

title: Outcomes: Insights Beyond the Counter
author: outcomesbeyondthecounter
description: Outcomes: Insights Beyond the Counter is a thought leadership podcast that brings together voices from pharmacy, payer, life sciences, and across the healthcare industry to explore the trends, innovations, and strategies shaping the future of patient care. From medication management and adherence to pharmacy intelligence, automation, and clinical outcomes, each episode delivers expert perspectives and actionable insights to help listeners stay ahead in a rapidly evolving healthcare landscape.

title: European Market Brief
author: Mark Longo
description: The European Market Brief discusses current activity across a broad spectrum of Eurex products (e.g. EURO STOXX®, VSTOXX®, DAX®, Euro-Bund, Euro-Bobl, Euro-Schatz derivatives, etc.). We look at trading activity across Eurex's options and futures products. The program also features special guests discussing the unique developments in each respective market.

title: Interstate and Main Street
author: Interstate Engineering
description: Interstate and Main Street is a podcast connecting our expertise with the communities it serves. Each episode features Interstate Engineering specialists sharing insights into our services, including engineering, planning, funding, landscape architecture, GIS, and more. We also welcome clients and guest professionals to discuss current and future projects, highlighting the people, projects, and progress shaping strong, vibrant communities across the region.

title: Amcha Girls 2026 Shiurim
author: Amcha Girls
description: All shiurim from Amcha girls 2026!

title: Innovation Unpacked
author: Kearney PERLab
description: Innovation Unpacked by Kearney PERLab explores how innovation is shaping the future of products. In each episode, we connect with leading experts, executives, and innovators to unpack the trends, technologies, and strategic decisions driving change. From product design to packaging, from supply chains to sustainability, we translate complex developments into clear insights on what it takes to stay competitive.

title: The Viv Lela Show
author: Vivian Lee-Lauss
description:
By her mid-thirties, Vivian Lee-Lauss had made it. Corporate exec at a multinational company, with fourteen years behind her at BMW and Kraft Heinz. A career built from scratch after moving to Germany with no language, no network, and no job.
Then she quit — to write a fantasy novel.
This is the show where she takes you inside it. The writing. The cover art disasters. The beta reader feedback that gutted her. Every call she's gotten wrong so far.
Her debut romantasy, Call of Matter, launches February 2027. For fans of Fourth Wing and Crescent City. Excerpts at callofmatter.com.

title: The Intrapreneurial Life
author: The Intrapreneurial Life Podcast
description: Here we discuss intrapreneurship, entrepreneurship and the intersection of the two in corporate America.

title: Kurt McDonald | Triathlon
author: kam industries
description: Sharing my journey as a professional triathlete racing on the T100 Triathlon World Tour.

title: Philemon Agric Podcast
author: Philemon Mutema
description: The Next Stage after JICA KCCP "Market-oriented Agriculture Promotion for Extension Officer"

title: Integrated Movement & Manual Therapy (IMMT)
author: Richard Brown
description: Welcome to the IMMT channel where we talk about all things Pilates, Functional Movement, Feldenkrais & Manual Therapy

title: The Problem Was Me
author: Thomas Gagliano
description: The Problem Was Me hosted by Thomas Gagliano, a best selling author and social worker will be discussing issues from negative childhood messages to relationships, to addiction and gambling. Join Tom every week with his candor and humility as he touches on these issues from his own personal experiences and help listeners break the cycles of negative and addictive thinking.

title: Healing Starts Here
author: Mary Greensmith & Dee Nicole
description:
Welcome to Healing Starts Here — the podcast where homeopathy meets energy healing.
Hosts D and Mary are both trained homeopaths with a shared passion for exploring the full spectrum of natural healing modalities. But they noticed something: for too long, there's been a hard line between homeopaths and energy healers, even though both are working toward the same goal. This podcast bridges that gap.
From Reiki and acupuncture to plant medicine, hypnotherapy, and trauma work, Dee and Mary explore how energy healing is not something foreign — it's inherently human. Each episode brings open, unscripted conversations with practitioners, guests, and each other, guided by curiosity rather than rules.
Because healing doesn't start with a single modality. It starts with exploration. It starts with conversation. It starts with a willingness to look at things differently.
Healing Starts Here.

title: Marvel News Desk: Born Again
author: Adam Barnhardt
description: Marvel News Desk is your best source for the latest Marvel Cinematic Universe news, reviews, and speculation. Adam, Caleb, and Rhiannon RETURN to breakdown everything you need to know about the latest and greatest in the MCU. Formerly Marvel News Desk. Formerly The MCUExchange podcast.

title: Love Your Mondays
author: Makenzie Chilton
description: You spend 1/3 of your life at work, you deserve to spend that time with purpose and excitement. Join Makenzie Chilton founder of Love Your Mondays and guests each week as they discuss common career topics and themes, with actionable advice you can apply to whatever job you are in. From entrepreneurship to leadership, to moving into a role perfect for uniquely you this podcast will deliver through storytelling, amazing guests, and community highlights.

title: Life Beyond the Ladder
author: Dalisia Coppersmith
description: For accomplished women who've ever wondered, “Is this all there is?... Is this all I am?” Let's design a second act you can't wait to live! Join Career Strategist & Midlife Reinvention Guide Dalisia Coppersmith each week for personal growth, inspiration, and a reminder of all you can still become. We'll move from those questions to a next chapter you're excited about as you step into becoming that woman now--not "someday." Let's bring your future into focus!

title: Abutorab Islam
author: Abutorab Islam
description: Reconnecting you to the Qur'an and Sunnah of our beloved Messenger (peace and blessings be upon Him)

title: Unfilitered &Unbothered
author: Charline Dorval
description:
Unfiltered & Unbothered is a late-night space for real conversations and raw thoughts, and the feelings people don't usually say out loud.
Hosted by Charline, this podcast dives into relationships, self-worth, healing growth, and figuring life out one honest moment at a time.
No filter. No pretending. Just real life. 
If you've ever felt misunderstood, overthought everything, or needed somewhere to just be real, this is for you 
You're not the only one

title: The Sound Journey Podcast
author: Jeremy Sefa
description: The Sound Journey is a podcast that explores the stories behind the music. Each episode features conversations with artists, producers, and creatives about how they started, the challenges they've faced, the lessons they've learned, and the moments that shaped their careers. Whether you're an aspiring musician or simply love music, discover the people, passion, and journeys behind every sound.

title: Both Sides of the Stage with Dan Haynes
author: Dan Haynes
description:
Introducing ’Both Sides of the Stage’ Podcast where we engage in insightful conversations with music industry professionals about the triumphs and challenges they face in the business today.
This platform not only sheds light on the dynamic nature of the industry but also serves as a promotional opportunity for service providers and industry trail blazers to join us and educate those interested in the inner workings of running and organizing a working live band and hopefully put some fire in your belly to be the best you can possibly be on and off ’The Stage’.
Tune in to discover the true heartbeat of the music scenes in the UK, connect with peers and learn about resources that elevate your Band, Venue and knowledge of what makes the music industry tick.

title: Josiah Venture Stories
author: Gwynne Turner
description: Josiah Venture is a non-profit mission organization that equips young leaders in Central and Eastern Europe to fulfill Christ's commission through the local church. We want to see passionate followers of Jesus Christ with a vision to reach and disciple their generation for him. This podcast is about sharing life-changing stories from on-the-ground missionaries and the local people they work with to inspire and fuel the movement of God in Central and Eastern Europe.

title: NOT BY SIGHT with Deborah Stuart
author: Deborah Stuart
description: Welcome to "Not By Sight", a podcast featuring life-changing stories of faith and hope that are birthed out of difficult seasons - the valleys of life. This is a place where you'll find inspiration, support and encouragement to walk out life in faith.

title: Women Without Limits Podcast
author: MARCHON
description:
Brought to you by MARCHON and hosted by Lucy Mills, Women Without Limits creates space for the real conversations about fitness that women have been waiting for.
Honest, raw and unfiltered, each episode brings together incredible women to talk about ambition, confidence, identity, motherhood, resilience and everything that comes with showing up every day. 
This isn't about those polished wellness stories or perfect answers. Just real conversations about how we do life beyond the highlight reel.
Welcome to Women Without Limits.

title: Wrong Bloke, Right Mess
author: Case
description:
When a British lad is teleported into a fantasy world and his only hope of getting home is by fulfilling an ancient prophecy he knows nothing about (and neither does anyone else!)
Whilst learning how to live in this new world and desperately trying to avoid people who keep singing at him, he answers every situation with a typical Londoner response. 
This podcast is a 1 man project on an extreme budget. New episodes every week!

title: Dark Waters Podcast
author: James Williams
description:
Some stories don't stay on the surface. Dark Waters is a podcast about the things that keep people up at night — the news the mainstream flattens, the cultural currents pulling underneath it, and the encounters that don't fit anyone's tidy explanation. Host James Williams didn't come to this from a studio. He came from the field. Over nine years he's logged more than 1,000 witness interviews — sitting on porches and tailgates with people who saw something they can't unsee, and who usually paid a price for saying so.

 That work took him to Nat Geo's Beast Hunter and Travel Channel's Destination Fear, and to the radio booth at WBOK 1230 AM in New Orleans, where he learned that the most important part of any story is the person telling it. He brings an engineer's habits to all of it — evidence first, structure over speculation — and a Christian's conviction that truth is worth chasing even when it costs you. That combination is what makes Dark Waters different. Faith isn't a coat of paint here. It's the keel. Every episode: the news that actually matters, the questions nobody's asking, and the witness accounts you won't hear anywhere else. Bring your discernment. Leave your assumptions. Dark Waters. Go deeper.

title: Science with Benefits
author: Rod Lamberts
description:
In each episode of Science with Benefits, a different STEMM sector insider shares insights, perspectives and personal stories from their career and life experience. 


In conversation with OG science communicator Dr Rod Lamberts*, guests aren't always "the usual  suspects" in STEMM, but they all share one thing: a unique perspective on the sector you haven't heard before.


Whether you're en experienced insider or at the beginning of your STEMM career, there's always something interesting on Science with Benefits. 


*Rod has been a science communication academic and practitioner for nearly 30 years. Check out his much more NSFW podcast "A Little Bit of Science" wherever you get your podcasts. And stay tuned for a new one coming in late 2026!

title: This Noisy Planet
author: Fey Ugokwe Esq.
description: This world is noisy. On This Noisy Planet Pod, we let it know.

title: The Restoration Psychology Podcast
author: Restoration Psychology
description: Hosted by a team of experienced counselors, we are a Colorado-based practice passionate about serving our community with clinical excellence and thoughtful care. This podcast explores psychology and its intersections with everyday life, relationships, faith, culture, and the challenges we all face. Through engaging conversations and practical insights, we break down complex topics into relatable, accessible discussions that help you better understand yourself and the world around you.

title: Matt Has A Podcast About Podcasting
author: Matt Medeiros
description: Matt has a podcast about podcasting! It's a semi-weekly discussion about what it's like being an indie podcaster.

title: The Night Visitor
author: Blerime Topalli & Peter Stass
description:
The Night Visitor Podcast is a cinematic horror anthology, blending psychological terror, immersive sound design, and character-driven storytelling. Each story unfolds across three weekly episodes, followed by a behind-the-scenes discussion hosted by co-creators Blu Topalli and Peter Stass. Together, they explore their collaborative process, the role of sound in creating immersive entertainment, and the real-world inspirations behind their horror narratives.

Through its haunting stories and reflective commentary, The Night Visitor examines fear, morality, and social themes through the lens of horror. The result is a thought-provoking audio drama experience reminiscent of The Witch, The Terror, Sinners, and The Twilight Zone.

title: Dear Tiffany
author: Tiffany Ellison
description: Dear Tiffany is where timeless beauty meets modern wisdom. Hosted by former Miss California Tiffany Ellison, this podcast invites women to rediscover their radiance and embrace the art of aging gracefully. From aesthetic treatments and wellness rituals to reinvention, business, and self-confidence, Tiffany sits down with thought leaders and real women who are redefining midlife.

title: Tactics and Testimonies
author: Tactics and Testimonies
description: Tactics and Testimonies is a podcast where faith and everyday life meet. Hosted by Jacob, Travis, and Daniel - Christians, first responders, a pastor, and a veteran - this show seeks to challenge and equip others to courageously and purposefully live the faith. The hosts will dive into what it means to follow Christ, in all areas of life, through real stories, practical wisdom, and powerful testimonies. The hosts will also bring encouragement, family, and biblical truth for those called to service.

title: The Sanctum Life
author: Bryton Rankin
description:
The Sanctum Life Podcast is where high-functioning women learn how to stop getting in their own way and start creating lives they truly love.

Join life coach Bryton Rankin each week for practical coaching, mindset tools, and honest conversations that will help you build self-trust, break old patterns, and lead your life on purpose.

Because the life you're living today is being created by patterns you didn't consciously choose. And when you learn how to change those patterns, everything changes.

title: AZC Dharma Studies
author: Auckland Zen Centre
description: These talks are from our annual winter Dharma Study sessions, where we explore a different text each year over a number of weeks.

title: Voices of Care | The Nonprofit Institute at CSM
author: The Nonprofit Institute at College of Southern Maryland
description: The Voices of Care podcast shines a bright light on the powerful, everyday work of caring across Southern Maryland. Through inspiring interviews with individuals on the front lines, the podcast uncovers fresh insights, personal stories and the real impact nonprofits make in our communities.

title: gabi gabs
author: gab
description: The place where all are invited. Come along the journey with me, a queer, filipinx, former DI athlete, ex-bullet journaler, corporate cosplayer, runner in training, candle enthusiast, the list goes on and will continue to grow. I feel like I've spent too much of my life compartmentalizing different aspects of myself and separating them to appease the rest of the world. This is the place where all are invited; where all of me are invited. My passionate thoughts, hot takes, and hopefully special guests will accompany us all in our unique journeys of life.

title: The kimthomaswriting's Podcast
author: kimthomaswriting
description: Hello and welcome to my Podcast! This is my first podcast where I will talk about a variety of different subjects from books to writing to clothes to everyday life. The podcast has the same name as my blog which is kimthomaswriting.wordpress.com. I hope that you enjoy.

title: Kotoba Japanese
author: Yuki Teaches Japanese
description:
『Kotoba Japanese』へようこそ！
この番組は、日本語学習者のための「オール日本語」ポッドキャストです。 ホストのゆきとけんとが、教科書だけでは学べない「自然な日本語」をカジュアルにお届けします。
日常会話を豊かにするオノマトペから、ビジネスシーンで重宝するクッション言葉まで、中級（N4/N3）から上級（N1）レベルの皆さんが「今すぐ使いたい！」と思える実用的な表現やフレーズ、そして文化的ニュアンスを分かりやすく解説します。
各エピソードには、学んだ表現を使ったリアルなモデル会話（ロールプレイ）も収録。リスニング力の向上はもちろん、シャドーイングやスピーキングの練習にも最適です。
私たちと一緒に、日本語の言葉の世界を一歩ずつ深めていきましょう！
Welcome to "Kotoba Japanese"!
This is an immersive, all-Japanese podcast designed specifically for N4 to N1 Japanese learners.
Join Yuki and Kento as they bring you casual, natural conversations that go beyond textbook Japanese.
From colorful everyday onomatopoeia to essential "cushion words" used to navigate polite social and business situations, we break down practical vocabulary and cultural nuances entirely in natural, easy-to-follow Japanese.
Each episode features a realistic model dialogue (roleplay) to help you hear the target phrases in context, making this podcast the perfect companion for active listening, shadowing, and speech practice.
Let's explore the world of Japanese words (Kotoba) together!

title: in case i forget | Theology and Testimony Reminders for Godly Wives and Mothers
author: Miki M
description:
If you’re a godly wife and mom in the middle of a hard transition, struggling to remember what God has done — or just ready to go deeper in your understanding of biblical theology — you found your people. This is your digital Ebenezer that YHWH is real and able.
Hey sister, welcome to In Case I Forget.
This podcast was born out of my own repentance — again — for forgetting what God has brought me through and letting doubt and fear drive me right back into control mode.
It started while I was reading through Exodus. I genuinely could not understand how the Israelites could be so forgetful. Like...
He sent 10 plagues for their freedom.
He literally walked them through two walls of ocean on dry ground.
He fed them manna. From heaven.
And they still complained as if God had done nothing.
I was mid-thought about how ridiculous that was when the Holy Spirit convicted me.
Miki. You literally do the same thing.
I was in the middle of a really hard transition — one that was so full of God — and yet my problems felt bigger than the God who had so clearly carried us through so much. Sound familiar?
So here we are. We talk theology and testimony because ”we overcome by the blood of the Lamb and the word of our testimony” (Revelation 12:11) — and we keep going until ”we all attain to the unity of the faith and of the knowledge of the Son of God, to mature manhood, to the measure of the stature of the fullness of Christ” (Ephesians 4:13 ESV).
Turn this on while you’re catching up on dishes and let’s remember together.
Love,
Miki
P.S. I’ve been convicted by the Holy Spirit about the use of AI, so here’s my pledge to you: I teach and speak only by the leading of the Holy Spirit, using Logos Software to help me find resources for our theological conversations. The only place I use AI is to write my show notes directly from my transcripts.

title: Feel Better Today with Corey Proffitt-Boyd
author: New Image Studios
description:
Feel Better with Corey Proffitt-Boyd is a podcast where wellness meets real life.
Hosted by Nationally Board Certified Massage Therapist Corey Proffitt-Boyd, the show explores the connection between stress, healing, emotional wellness, and the everyday chaos we all carry. Through honest conversations, relatable humor, and thoughtful insight, Corey brings a refreshing approach to massage therapy, self-care, burnout, anxiety, grief, relationships, and the realities of modern life.
Whether it’s discussing what stress actually does to the body, why people struggle to slow down, or the emotional weight many silently carry, Feel Better Today with Corey Proffitt-Boyd creates a space that feels calming, genuine, and human.
Professional without being preachy, therapeutic without taking itself too seriously — this is wellness for real people.

title: One Way To Find Out Podcast
author: Tinsley Performance
description: One Way to Find Out is the official podcast of Tinsley Performance, hosted by owner Cal Tinsley. Each episode features conversations with professional athletes, rising stars, business owners, coaches, and leaders making an impact in their communities. From training and performance to faith, leadership, and life beyond the game, every conversation is centered on helping listeners grow on and off the field. There’s only one way to find out.

title: WE STILL RISE : Kagiso Youth Sessions
author: Thato Kgokong
description: WE STILL RISE: Kagiso Youth Sessions* is a podcast for real conversations, real stories, and real youth. Hosted by Thato Kgokong, we shine a spotlight on the voices, struggles, and wins of Kagiso and beyond. From culture to challenges to hope — we speak truth, we share rhythm, we rise together. Brought to you by T-Enables Arts Production. _We Still Rise. Because our story isn’t over.

title: The Local Focal Podcast
author: pauljacksonooga
description: It's the Local Focal Podcast, a weekly one-hour show highlighting the thriving and expanding Chattanooga music scene. The show began airing on WUTC in Chattanooga, celebrating its fifth year anniversary episode in summer 2025. We feature the latest music, interviews, and upcoming live performance updates from Chattanooga artists of all genres.

title: Em's Wild Life
author: Emeline
description:
What if regenerating the planet starts with regenerating yourself? Em's Wild Life is a podcast about saying yes to life, an unfiltered look at what it actually means to live in a human body on this earth right now. 
Hosted by Emeline, a scientist turned somatic practitioner and ceremonialist, each episode explores the parallel between healing the land and healing the human body through embodiment, plant medicine, regenerative practices, and the raw experience of being alive.

title: HiFi-LoPan
author: Luke Fedell and Emmanuel Ojode
description: HiFi LoPan is a movie podcast where two friends overanalyze films they probably should have gotten over years ago. We watch everything, from timeless classics and blockbuster hits to hidden gems, guilty pleasures, and the occasional cinematic train wreck. Expect sharp conversations, questionable opinions, unnecessary deep dives, and just enough sarcasm to keep things interesting. Because every movie is somebody's favorite... even the bad ones.

title: Feelosophically
author: Gary
description: Some thoughts are too heavy for daylight. Feelosophy is where they're carried gently — one philosopher, one idea, read slowly into the dark, for anyone who lies awake thinking. Less a lecture than a voice in the next room, thinking out loud, until the idea softens and you do too

title: New Books in Revolutionary America
author: New Books Network
description: Revolutionary America features conversations with authors of new scholarship on the transformative era spanning the 1750s through the 1820s across the Americas. Featuring interviews that explore political upheaval, social change, and the many meanings of “revolution” in this period, the channel highlights work on independence movements, constitutional formations, imperial crises, and the lived experiences of diverse peoples navigating a rapidly changing world. Co-directed by Edward Blum and Amy Weitzman, and produced in collaboration with the Society for Historians of the Early American Republic (SHEAR), Revolutionary America brings cutting-edge historical research to  scholars, students, and the interested public.

title: The Lobcast: A podcast on invasive lobular carcinoma
author: Deviyani Rao
description: The Lobcast covers all things invasive lobular carcinoma: from ILC basics to groundbreaking research to heartfelt patient stories. Join Dr. Deviyani Rao as she talks with both experts and patients to demystify this common breast cancer subtype.

title: Pixel Starships
author: SavySoda
description: The PodCast for the popular mobile strategy game Pixel Starships. Join the Savy Soda team in monthly AMA fireside chat where we discuss everything sci-fi, and go in-depth on upcoming strategies, tactics, and balance changes in the game.

title: Scripture & Life
author: Eric Kahure
description: Opening the Scriptures to see our God (Father, Son & Holy Spirit) more clearly, so that we can follow Him more faithfully in everyday life. A simple, Scriptural walk through the Christian faith, one passage and one practical truth at a time.

title: That Girl Radio
author: Rikki Lee
description:
That Girl Radio is the weekly supplement for the everyday ambitious woman ready to rewrite the blueprint and build a life she's proud of.
Hosted by brand strategist, entrepreneur, and life designer Rikki Lee, this podcast explores what it really takes to become that girl—the woman who is intentional, disciplined, faith-filled, and committed to becoming the highest version of herself.
Each week, Rikki dives into the conversations that matter: career growth, personal development, productivity, confidence, relationships, wellness, and the practical habits that help turn dreams into reality.

title: News Makers, presented by the Tippecanoe Gazette
author: Greg Enslen
description: Welcome to News Makers, the official podcast of the Tippecanoe Gazette! In each episode, the newspaper owner Greg Enslen brings you up close with the people shaping the future of our community—local newsmakers, business leaders, and community influencers who are making an impact in Tipp City and the surrounding areas. Through in-depth conversations, News Makers offers listeners updates and unique insights into the stories and initiatives that matter most to our community. Tune in to stay informed, inspired, and connected to the heartbeat of Tipp City! News Makers is a presentation of the Tippecanoe Gazette, a weekly print and digital newspaper published in Tipp City, Ohio. Subscribe today to the newspaper at www.tippgazette.com to enjoy weekly reporting covering local news, sports, events and items of interest.

title: Auxano
author: Ps. Wisdom Sablah
description:
Auxano is a faith-centered community devoted to spiritual growth, renewal, and purposeful living.

The name Auxano is a Hebrew word meaning growth, increase, and becoming better — a powerful reflection of the vision behind this gathering. Inspired by scriptures such as Luke 2:40 and Colossians 1:10, this podcast is a space where believers are encouraged to grow stronger in spirit, deepen in wisdom, and increase in the knowledge of God.

Many of us love God and desire to walk closely with Him, yet life’s pressures can sometimes dim our spiritual flame. Auxano exists to rekindle that fire. Through prayer, teaching, sharing, and pastoral guidance, each episode creates an opportunity for revival, strengthening, and transformation.

Every session reflects our heartbeat:

Pray. Learn. Grow.

Join us weekly as we seek God together, grow in faith, and step boldly into the purpose He has called us to fulfill.

title: Can We Talk About Art
author: Dr. Leia
description: Is this art? What actually defines art? What is essentially human about art? Can we expand on what we consider to be art? What is something you consider beautiful? Can art be silly? Why is it so expensive? What makes it worthy?

title: The Cashflow Show
author: Corporate Recovery Partners
description: The Cashflow Show is practical business content for Australian trade contractors, suppliers, and construction business owners. Real talk on chasing money you are owed, protecting your invoices, handling disputes, and staying solvent when the payment chain gets ugly. From Corporate Recovery Partners, the debt recovery firm that uses lawyers, not baseball bats.

title: Into the Blue
author: Robby Thomas
description: When the sky falls, the city runs for the Arks, the hundred-year-old evacuation shuttles everyone spent a lifetime mocking, kept polished as a monument to a doomsday that never came. Mary Solomon, seventeen, daughter of the richest man in the city, never makes it aboard. She drowns within sight of the lifeboats. And, something is waiting for her in the deep. Something with no name in any record, because it is older than records, older than form, older than light. It asks her for rescue. Then it changes her.

title: Rollin On D20s
author: Rollin on D20s
description:
Campaign 1 of Rollin on D20s is "Echoes of the Coalesced Moon" It is is an original Dungeons & Dragons campaign set in the world of Vaelmyr, a land shaped by ancient gods, forgotten civilizations, and the rare celestial event known as the Coalesced Moon. When five unlikely adventurers answer a mysterious summons, they find themselves drawn into a journey that quickly grows beyond local troubles and hidden ruins. As they explore dangerous frontiers, uncover long-buried secrets, and forge unexpected alliances, they begin to realize that the history of Vaelmyr may not be as settled as it seems. Blending cinematic storytelling, memorable characters, tactical combat, mystery, humor, and genuine emotional moments, Echoes of the Coalesced Moon is a character-driven adventure where every choice has consequences and every discovery reveals another piece of a much larger puzzle.


Show your support for Rollin on D20s by becoming one of our amazing patrons over on Patreon at http://www.patreon.com/rollinond20s Get ad free shows and a growing library of bonus content for only $5 a month!


Get even more Rollin on D20s content, including merch, our social medias, and our community discord, by going to http://www.onlydarkcorners.com

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

title: Besides Business
author: Matt McGuire
description: A podcast about who local professionals are besides business — the passions, stories, hobbies, and deeper cuts that don’t fit on a business card.

title: The Jay Henderson Show
author: Juan Henderson
description: The Jay Henderson Show is where culture, conversation, and real-life perspectives come together. Hosted by Jay Henderson, the show features authentic interviews, thought-provoking discussions, and inspiring stories from entertainers, entrepreneurs, community leaders, and everyday people making an impact. Real voices. Real conversations. Real culture.

title: Random Rambling
author: Anthony A. Perez
description: Random Rambling is a podcast hosted by Anthony A. Perez, featuring in-depth discussions with a diverse lineup of guests including YouTubers, musicians, filmmakers, actors, and personal acquaintances. Each episode explores creative journeys, industry insights, and personal stories, all shaped by candid interviews and real-time engagement with a live-stream audience.

title: Haul of Champions Podcast
author: HoC Podcast Network
description: Haul of Champions podcast is where two friends shoot the shit about their ever-growing collections of DVDs, Blu-rays, 4Ks, video games, and music---celebrating physical media without taking themselves too damn serious.

title: Shopping Centre Insiders
author: Shopping Centre News
description: A podcast that gives shopping centre professionals an all-access pass to the strategies, decisions, and outcomes shaping the industry. Each episode, we go beyond the headlines and into the detail: what’s working, what’s changing, and what’s next for retail property.

title: The Library Podcast
author: Rene
description: The Library Podcast gathers the voices of black and global majority creatives in intimate conversation by building a living digital archive.

title: Beyond The Office Podcast
author: Jerard J
description:
Beyond The Office

Life. Growth. Perspective. Beyond the Title.

Beyond The Office is a podcast hosted by Jerard Johnson that explores the conversations people often avoid but need most.

Through honest discussions, personal stories, practical insights, and occasional guest interviews, we examine life beyond careers, job titles, and expectations. From leadership and personal growth to relationships, resilience, purpose, community, and navigating life's transitions, each episode is designed to challenge perspectives and encourage meaningful growth.

Whether you're a professional building your career, a veteran transitioning into a new chapter, a leader seeking greater impact, or someone searching for purpose beyond success, Beyond The Office provides real conversations rooted in authenticity, experience, and insight.

Expect thoughtful discussions, occasional humor, and actionable takeaways that help you grow personally, professionally, and spiritually.

Topics Include:

• Personal Growth
 • Leadership & Influence
 • Relationships & Family
 • Career Development
 • Life Transitions
 • Mental Resilience
 • Community & Culture
 • Veteran Experiences
 • Purpose & Legacy
 • Success Beyond Titles

Real Conversations. Deep Perspectives. Lasting Impact.

Hosted by Jerard Johnson.

title: Whiskey Wealth and Wisdom
author: Keith Hoffman, Dan Murray, Mark Smolinski, & Taji Clark
description: We believe in creating meaningful experiences that inspire and connect. Let us help you bring your potential to life. Sharing stories and experiences, from guests in many areas of life, to help you become successful and avoid common pitfalls.

title: The Caregiver Circle
author: Karen Mcevitt
description:
The Caregiver Circle Podcast is two friends providing a place for connection, education, encouragement and shared experiences as caregivers, advocates and lifelong learners.  We share stories, resources and conversations that have helped us along the way with the hope they may help you too.  


Welcome to the Caregiver Circle.

title: The College Experience by SSS
author: SSS Chattanooga
description: This podcast is designed to answer questions, provide advice and share stories about all things college. Hosted by UT Chattanooga's Student Support Services program. <hr>

title: Drift Radio
author: JD Merrick
description: Drift away with us as we explore haunting stories of the strange and supernatural. Drift Radio is an anthology horror audio drama, with new episodes every two weeks.

title: Shadows of Suspicion
author: Ashley Allison
description:
Welcome to Shadows of Suspicion! Where we discuss all current events and crazy conspiracies that will make you THINK! 
So get comfy, grab a snack.. and let’s get into it!

title: Fat Daddy Sports
author: Fat Daddy Sports
description: Welcome to the Fat Daddy Sports Podcast—your home for NFL football, fantasy football, bold predictions, and unfiltered opinions. Each week, we break down the biggest games, hottest storylines, fantasy advice, power rankings, and everything happening around the league. Whether you’re a die-hard fan or just love talking football, you’ll find entertaining conversation, honest takes, and plenty of laughs. New episodes every week—join the Fat Daddy family and let’s talk football!

title: Unplugged and Unlocked - The Educational Podcast for Kids
author: Sethi De Clercq and Glitches the Robot
description: Welcome to Unplugged & Unlocked, a high-energy, laugh-out-loud computer science podcast for curious kids! Join the Digital Storyteller and his slightly oblivious robotic best friend, Glitches, as they smash open the secret inner workings of the digital world. Can a robot make a peanut butter sandwich? Is the internet swimming with sharks? Are invisible tech waves bouncing off your forehead? Every episode strips away the confusing jargon to answer big questions with real history, crazy tech facts, and interactive mid-show quizzes. Perfect for classrooms, car rides, and future tech superstars!

title: Knight's Round Table
author: Faith Christian Academy
description: Welcome to the Knight's round table. Meet our teachers, students, faculty and governers that make up our community at FCA. Come with us as our cohosts dive into the life of an everyday Knight.

title: Don Bosco's Dream
author: Mal
description: Don Bosco's dreams is a podcast that focuses on reading the original dream accounts clearly and respectfully. It is for anyone who wants to enter into Don Bosco's world and hear these remarkable dreams in a calm, prayerful and accessible form.

title: A Real Family
author: Anne and Matt VanOrder
description:
He's a 50-something, gen x, widowed father of four. 


She's a thirtysomething, millineiall, divorced mother of 3. 


They got married after dating for 7 months and have been married less than a year. 


What could *possibly* go wrong? 


Find out on a Real Family Podcast.

title: Sacred Astrology & More with Mary Silvernail
author: Mary Silvernail
description:
This podcast explores current astrological trends and shows you how to align with them in a more conscious, intentional, and empowering way.  This a powerful space where astrology is honored as Sacred—God's clock guiding both our personal journeys and the collective world around us.


Through the Sacred integration of numerology, angelic guidance, clinical hypnotherapy, past life regression, and energy healing including Native American traditions, Mary helps you connect with your truth and deeper purpose.  Each episode invites you to not just understand your life, but to transform it with clarity, alignment, and connection.

title: The Lucy Walsh Podcast
author: L W
description:
Lucy Walsh coaches Mindset | Acting | Voice to VIP performers & leaders worldwide.


Lucy has a lot to teach about picking up life's shattered pieces after trauma & heartbreak - having survived a stalker, escaped a cult, & grown up in inside the absurdity of show business & a famous family.


Transforming her adversity into a universal guide for resilience & fulfillment, Lucy has now built a global coaching business, found true love during a pandemic, become a published author, & national spokeswoman advocating for elderly companionship programs in nursing homes.


The Lucy Walsh Podcast is for all humans who desire raw conversation around what it means to be human & how to achieve the impact they were created for. Lucy hosts with workable steps, energetic insight, & spiritual remedies to help people reclaim their power & thrive in life, business, and love.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

title: Mission: ReMission
author: Pillar Missions
description: Mission: ReMission is a Christ-centered podcast that helps you rediscover your true identity in Christ, replace lies with biblical truth, and live every day on mission with purpose, hope, and courage.

title: Where My Heart Writes
author: Yumna Elkhabir
description: Quiet reminders for hearts trying to find Allah in the middle of ordinary life. Reflections from the Qur'an, stories of the prophets, and gentle reminders that bring us back to what matters.

title: The Coherence Project
author: Amy Gunderson-Lewis and Tyler Lewis
description:
The Coherence Project explores what it means to live as an integrated human in a rapidly changing world. Through conversations on healing, human performance, nervous system regulation, relationships, consciousness, leadership, purpose, and growth, the show connects science, wisdom, and lived experience.

At its core, the podcast is about coherence—the alignment between who we are, how we think and feel, how we lead, and how we engage with life. It is for curious people who want to understand themselves more deeply, live more intentionally, and create lives that feel aligned from the inside out.

title: When Simon Met
author: Simon Wilson
description:
Award winning presenter and producer Simon Wilson catches up with your favourite musicians, comedians and artists, filled with games stupidity and prizes! 
Frank Turner - I have done A LOT of interviews over the years. As tours roll by, certain faces become familiar, and it's possible to build something of a rapport with someone over time. Every time I'm in the south of the UK, for a good few albums now, I get interviewed by Simon Wilson (for Voice FM). It's always a total blast, funny, engaging, surprising, insightful, silly.

title: UFO Truth Seeker Podcast
author: Axel Holmes
description: In this podcast we work together to compile as much first hand eye witness experience we can to piece together the puzzle of the UFO phenomenon. You don't need to be a government whistleblower in order to get to the bottom of this secret. I want to hear from all of you to find out as much info as I can about who is operating the crafts. What are their intentions? Where do they come from? If you have a story I want to hear it! Record your experience with your phones recorder app and send it to ufotruthseekerpodcast@gmail.com and your story will be anonymously featured on the show!

title: Morning Wine
author: Naomi Nuels
description:
Morning Wine is a spiritual insight podcast by Naomi Nuels focused on discernment, purpose, spiritual growth, healing, and alignment with God’s will through the Word of God.
Each episode is designed to bring clarity, wisdom, revelation, and deeper spiritual understanding through honest, Spirit-led teaching.

title: Caleb Tullos Podcast
author: Caleb
description: This podcast exists to help other people learn Business skills, Leadership skills, and to help musicians have a successful music career. This podcast also exists as a way people can monitor my growth as a follower of Jesus Christ, as a businessman, as a leader, and as a musician. I'm here to serve you! I'm happy you're here! Enjoy!

title: Interpolated
author: GRFN Studios
description: Welcome to Interpolated, the podcast where we explore the history, the music, and the humans behind one of New York’s biggest rock bands, Interpol.

title: Protecting Pearls
author: Liz Green
description:
Welcome to The Pearl Perspective, with Liz Green; a Christ-centered podcast helping people heal, gain clarity, and develop biblical discernment after unhealthy or abusive church leadership experiences.Each episode explores the complex dynamics of spiritual abuse, manipulation, unhealthy leadership, people-pleasing, biblical boundaries, reconciliation, forgiveness, and healing through the lens of both Scripture and practical wisdom.
You'll hear honest conversations, biblical teaching, anonymous stories, interviews with survivors, pastors, field experts, ministry leaders, and others.

title: Meek Man's podcast
author: Bismark Ayambire Akolbila
description: Podcasting...

title: Leatherneck: USMC History & War Stories
author: Leatherneck: USMC History & War Stories | USMC Military History
description: The ultimate USMC history and military war stories podcast. Step inside the ranks to explore gripping first-person combat stories, legendary battles from Belleau Wood to Fallujah, and the profiles of famous Marines like Chesty Puller who forged the Devil Dog legacy. From our Revolutionary War roots at Tun Tavern to modern operations, we deliver raw, unclassified Marine Corps history for veterans, active duty personnel, and history buffs. Semper Fi!

title: Hi Strangeness
author: 8th Haus Studios
description: A sad, sexy, spooky anthology of speculative fiction exploring the beautiful horrors of Black queer life.

title: Get Outta My Head the Podcast
author: Daniel Washing
description: A show where I talk about things I find interesting or concerning, or talk with cool people about the cool things they are doing and why you should care about it. Come get outta my head with me!

title: The stateless foundation
author: Sibusiso
description: how to cope with metal illness

title: LGBTQ+ Freedom Fighters with Karen Ocamb
author: Karen Ocamb
description:
Karen Ocamb has a broadly informed and deeply experienced view of what it means to be an LGBTQ+ freedom fighter. A journalist since 1973, when she clerked for Walter Cronkite, Dan Rather, and Bob Schieffer at CBS News, to producing coverage of the 1984 Olympics for CBS affiliates, Karen joined the “gay press” in the late 1980s after losing more than 100 friends to AIDS. Believing that “the personal is political,” she hopes to inform and inspire intersectional LGBTQ+ people through these shared conversations and stories to find their own power and joy in this long fight for freedom and equality.

Check Karen’s LGBTQ+ Freedom Fighters Substack for editorial context for the interviews. A note: AIDS Healthcare Foundation is a sponsor of this Substack. This podcast is distributed through partnership with the Los Angeles Blade.

title: Yukon Wildlife and Wildfire
author: Yukon Wildlife Viewing/Government of Yukon
description: Wildfire can leave a landscape looking like a lifeless moonscape, but the forest isn’t dead. Beneath the blackened stumps and charred ground, new life emerges. Equipped with field guides, binoculars and a healthy dose of curiosity, Carrie and Karen, intrepid naturalists with the Government of Yukon’s Wildlife Viewing Program, trek through post-fire landscapes to see what’s sprouting, who’s passing through and why it all matters for the boreal forest.

title: JOJO 🌈 podcast
author: EVIL MAE 😈
description:
THE HOMEGIRL
Alone in this intrusive world

title: 2 Shrinks & a Drink
author: Insights Group South
description: Two PhDs in clinical psychology walk into a podcast...and nothing is off-limits

title: Creepy Sleepy Bedtime Stories
author: Creepy Stories
description:
Welcome to Creepy Sleepy Bedtime Stories. 
Take a deep breath, close your eyes, and follow the whispers into the darkness. Gentle tales of mystery, eerie places, and strange encounters, carefully crafted to calm your mind and help you drift into a peaceful sleep. 
Close your eyes. Listen. Drift away. 
Sweet dreams!

title: Denver Sounds Like
author: David Harris
description: Community news, diverse voices and rich soundscapes from the mile high city.

title: What The Female Podcast
author: MJ with the T, Dr. LA, and Nurse Kat
description: A multi-generational deep dive into the reality of womanhood. Everything that was taboo to discuss, we're discussing.

title: Matriarchs: Journeys and Memoirs
author: Women Spirit
description: The podcast invites listeners into the emotional and historical journeys of matriarchs: the women who carried traditions, made difficult choices, held families together, broke cycles, and created paths for those who came after them. Blending memory, culture, and lived experience, “Matriarchs / Journeys and Memoirs” is a space for honoring women’s stories not as footnotes, but as central narratives of love, power, endurance, and legacy.

title: The Crew Lounge
author: Charity Bowman
description: The Crew Lounge is your go-to podcast for advisor training, company news, and behind-the-scenes conversations. Think of it as your mid-journey stop to gain clarity, confidence, and direction in your travel business.

title: Forward | Better Athletes. Better People.
author: Hard Knock Press
description: Forward is the youth sports podcast for parents, coaches, and mentors who want to develop better athletes—and better people. Hosted by Coach Joe Clemente and publisher Kevin Mulhearn, each episode explores youth sports, leadership, parenting, and personal growth through honest conversations, practical advice, and stories that challenge conventional wisdom. Inspired by the bestselling book The Long Ride Home, Forward helps families keep the game in perspective while never losing sight of what matters most.

title: Christian Center Shreveport
author: Christian Center Shreveport
description: Sermons and podcasts aimed to spread the gospel in the form of digital media. Our mission is to be a voice in the arts and media, to shift the culture of our community and beyond. Transforming lives through media. To equip the saints through sound biblical teaching and help the Body experience inner healing so that they may lead others to the same healing. These teachings help the body fulfill Revelation 3:18 so they may see and hear the Lord more clearly.

title: WWI
author: CRIME MYSTERY FILES
description: Become a supporter of this podcast: https://www.spreaker.com/podcast/wwi--7172121/support.

title: Flyers Latest | Daily Philadelphia Flyers Podcast
author: Fan Arch
description:
Flyers Latest is your go-to podcast for Philadelphia Flyers news, analysis, rumors, and updates. Hosted by Colin Kelley, the show covers everything Flyers fans need to know, including game breakdowns, roster moves, trade rumors, NHL Draft coverage, free agency, prospects, injuries, and the latest storylines surrounding the team.

Whether you follow every game or just want to stay informed on what is happening with the Orange and Black, Flyers Latest delivers consistent, fan-focused coverage and honest analysis of Philadelphia Flyers hockey.

Follow Flyers Latest on Spotify so you never miss an episode.

Whether it's a heartfelt tale of overcoming adversity, insights into unique life experiences, or candid discussions on pressing societal issues, "Real People Real Talk" brings you unfiltered narratives straight from the source.

author: Wes Lyon
description:
Young dentists are faced with some of the most important decisions in their careers right out of school, and yet most of the advice out there is geared towards retiring dentists. We’re here to change that. NextGenDDS focuses on providing clarity and actionable advice to young dentists. Join your hosts, Dr. Scott Menaker and Mario Santiago CPA, CFP®, as they guide young dentists on both the financial and clinical aspects of dentistry.

About Us

For over 40 years, their team has helped dentists exceed their goals through tax planning, financial planning, financial consulting, practice transitions, wealth management, legal services, and continuing education events, by providing objective and sound advice to doctors in every career stage. 

The group also publishes The McGill & Lyon Dental Advisory, a dental business publication offering valuable insights for all dentists. The McGill & Lyon Dental Advisory provides strategies and advice to help minimize federal and state income taxes, maximize practice profits, reduce overhead expenses, and create and protect your wealth.  Membership includes monthly issues, searchable archives, special reports and bulletins, Q&As, financial calculators, forms, guides, letters, and more!

Host Biographies:

Scott Menaker, DDS  

Dr. Scott Menaker enjoyed a successful 38-year career as a practicing dentist, before transitioning to pursue his passion of helping young dentists succeed. Scott now works as a buyer representative, helping young dentists purchase practices and avoid the pitfalls of a failed transition.

Mario Santiago, CPA, CFP®

Mario Santiago is a tax, business, and financial planning advisor who works exclusively with dentists and dental specialists across the country. He helps doctors reduce taxes, improve practice profitability, and plan confidently for retirement, and is a frequent speaker for local, state, and national dental organizations. Having grown up with two dentist parents, Mario brings a unique perspective and a commitment to honest, objective guidance.

title: The Melanated Podcast
author: Timothy Watson
description:
Let's settle this right now.
You're a creator.
It's why the work won't leave you alone.
It's why success never fully satisfies you.
You've created things. Real things.
Ideas that wouldn't let you sleep.
Pieces nobody asked for, but you had to make anyway.
Work that felt bigger than the room it landed in.
And still, you find yourself looking for a deeper meaning.
Because what you're building
and what you're capable of
are not the same size.
You've been called a dreamer.
Like you'd eventually come back down.
You didn't.
You outgrew the rooms.
You just haven't been building at your full frequency.
Because creativity isn't just output.
It's signal.
It's rhythm.
It's transmission.
And most of us were taught to mute ours.
The Melanated Creative Podcast is for Black and Brown creatives who know there's more in them than what the current system makes room for.
This is where we tune back in.
To Creative Frequencies, the original rhythm beneath the noise.
The clarity beneath the hustle.
The intelligence beneath the performance.
We dismantle hustle culture.
We expose broken systems.
We reclaim rhythm, voice, and creative authority.
This is about participation.
With what's ancient in you.
With what's intelligent in you.
With what refuses to die in you.
You don't owe the world perfection.
You owe the lineage your participation.
You ready?
Let's go.
This is what creative freedom sounds like.

title: Future Health NOW
author: Future Health NOW
description:
Every day, there are public health crises threatening the livelihoods of our families and communities. While the novel coronavirus has taken center stage, there are several other escalating issues impacting our society, not limited to: mental health, generational poverty, inadequate nutrition access, and rising healthcare costs that widen the opportunity chasm.

However, there’s still so much hope! 

Our youngest consumers, Gen Z, are much more aware of the health risks of fast food, stress, sugary drinks, various medications, and social media than previous generations. This awareness has been leading them further away from choices that negatively impact their overall health.

🤔 What if we...

  • awakened to solutions for a healthier future?
  • became better guardians of our mind, body, and soul?
  • helped save the lives of our loved ones before losing them too early?
  • poured into and empowered the healthiest future generations to follow?

🤔 How will the future health of our families and communities look, if we start NOW?

Subscribe to this podcast and join our host, Shavonne Reed, Founder of OPUA Agency, as she embarks on a journey of answering these questions by having crucial conversations with today’s top public health leaders who will edify us all on how to increase lifespans, pay less over time with preventative healthcare, lead more active lifestyles, and build a more sustainable tomorrow… starting today!

Together… we can become more Optimistic People, Unified for Awareness that leads to action and better peace of mind towards the livelihood of our future generations.

This is Future Health NOW!

author: Knotel
description:
Welcome to The Managed Office Reset, a podcast series that pulls back the curtain on the next evolution of commercial real estate.


The flexible office market has undergone a massive transformation in recent years, moving far beyond its traditional "serviced office" roots to embrace a more sophisticated, partnership-focused model: managed workspace. But what does that actually mean for the future of work?


Our Mission: To clarify exactly what ‘managed’ is, what it does, and what it enables for owners, advisors, and occupiers looking to reset, reposition, and build for long-term performance.


Recorded at Knotel’s flagship London property, Old Sessions House, this series brings together institutional landlords, design visionaries, and fast-growing business leaders to unpack the real-world impact of the managed model.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

Hosted by CCU co-founder Michael Wolfe, each episode brings together attorneys, advocates, real estate professionals, and other experts to discuss important legislative, regulatory, financial, and operational issues facing co-op and condo boards, managing agents, homeowners, and residents.

From new laws and government mandates to affordability, sustainability, compliance, and the challenges of managing and maintaining New York’s residential communities, Expert Insights goes beyond the headlines to explain what is happening, why it matters, and what co-op and condo communities need to know.

title: El último judío. Noah Gordon. Audiolibro
author: Turner Books
description:
*El último judío* es una apasionante novela histórica de Noah Gordon que transporta al oyente a la España de finales del siglo XV, una época marcada por la Inquisición y la expulsión de los judíos. A través de la vida de Yonah Toledano, un joven obligado a ocultar su identidad para sobrevivir, la historia se convierte en un intenso viaje de valentía, aprendizaje y resistencia.
Mientras cambia de oficio, de nombre y de destino para escapar de la persecución, Yonah descubrirá el valor de sus raíces, el poder del conocimiento y la fuerza necesaria para mantenerse fiel a sí mismo en un mundo dominado por el miedo y la intolerancia. Con el inconfundible estilo narrativo de Noah Gordon, esta obra combina rigor histórico, aventura, emoción y personajes inolvidables.
En esta edición en audiolibro, la narración da vida a una de las novelas más aclamadas del autor, ofreciendo una experiencia inmersiva que invita a recorrer los paisajes, los conflictos y las esperanzas de una de las etapas más decisivas de la historia de España. Una historia épica sobre la identidad, la libertad y la supervivencia que sigue conmoviendo a lectores y oyentes de todo el mundo.

Come experience danger, romance, jealousy, betrayal, scandal, redemption, and even a critter-napping or two. It's all here when you enter the magnificent world of Annie and her fabulous faction of fellow farm friends!

Through honest conversations, practical insights, and thoughtful reflection, Tammy Delaney-Plugowsky helps you navigate life's transitions with greater clarity, purpose, and confidence so you can create a life that truly reflects what matters most, before life makes those decisions for you.

author: Clayrooksp
description: Deep Roots is a podcast for couples who want to grow stronger together. Through honest conversation and biblical wisdom, we dig into what helps relationships thrive — communication, trust, conflict, intimacy, and faith — so your roots grow deep enough to weather any season. From Natural Church Ministries.

title: Shifted
author: Givsly
description:
The media and advertising industry gets a lot of coverage but most of it focuses on what's happening, not on the people making it happen. And honestly? I think that's the more interesting story.

The way you lead, what you stand for, and the decisions that keep you up at night—that stuff doesn't just "happen." It comes from everything you've lived through. The experiences that shaped you, the people who challenged you, the moments that made you see things completely differently. That's what Shifted is really about.

I'm Chad Hickey, the founder and CEO of Givsly, the leading values-based marketing company. Each episode, I will sit down with someone who has made a real mark on this space — not to rehash their resume, but to have a genuine conversation about who they are. What do they value and where did that originate? How has their thinking shifted over the years? What experience caused that shift?

Think of it as the conversation you'd have with someone over a long dinner - just on the record.

We tackle the kitchen table issues that impact everyday life, from legislative decisions to local policies affecting communities statewide. Whether you live in a bustling city or a quiet rural town, Mississippi Happenings brings you the news you need, without the out-of-state distractions.
Join us each week for insightful discussions, in-depth analysis, and a fresh perspective on the issues shaping Mississippi’s future. Stay informed. Stay engaged.
