In this podcast, we meet current students at the University of Aberdeen, get the lowdown on what it’s really like from day one, and pick up some tips and advice to make your time in Aberdeen as amazing as it should be.

description:
Real business owners. Real bottlenecks. Fixed on camera.

Each week Paul sits down with a guest who's stuck — in manual work, disconnected tools, or processes their business has outgrown. They diagnose it live, map the fix, and start building. No theory, no fluff, no generic AI takes. Just the exact solution Paul would build for a paying client, handed over for free on camera.

Every episode is a case study your ICP can't stop watching — because it's their business on the screen.

title: AI in Real Time
author: Chartis
description:
Artificial intelligence (AI) is reshaping healthcare in real time—and healthcare leaders are under pressure to make high-stakes decisions almost as quickly. 

Hosted by Tom Kiesau, Chartis Chief AI & Digital Officer, and Sara Vaezy, Chartis Chief Product & Technology Officer, AI in Real Time explores what it takes for health systems to move beyond AI experimentation and build the capabilities needed for lasting transformation. 

Each episode examines the strategic decisions facing healthcare executives and boards today—from where to start and what to build, buy, or partner on to governance, operating models, and scaling AI responsibly across the enterprise.  

Through candid conversations grounded in real-world experience, Tom and Sara separate signal from noise and share practical insights to help leaders navigate rapid change, realize measurable value, and prepare their organizations for the future of healthcare.

Join two women for honest, off-the-cuff conversations about hormones, motherhood, health, relationships, personal growth, aging, and the realities of modern womanhood. No experts. No perfection. Just real conversations, lots of laughs, and the hot takes we're all thinking.

title: Breaking the ICE
author: ICE Tech
description:
Demystifying the Insurance World

Breaking the ICE is a podcast for everyone who works in the space where insurance meets technology - whether you're steeped in underwriting and claims, building the platforms that support them, or simply curious about how one of the world's oldest industries is being reshaped by the rise of Artificial Intelligence and other complementary technologies.

Hosted by Elliott Draga, Head of Growth at ICE Tech, alongside co-hosts Lloyd Overton and Mark Colonnese (and the occasional guest), the show draws on decades of combined practical experience in the global insurance sector. Together, the three of them unpack the ideas, technologies and trends shaping the industry today - and try to make sense of them without the baffling jargon that so often gets in the way.

Insurance has a reputation for being somewhat archaic and slow to change. Breaking the ICE sets out to challenge that assumption. Each episode looks at how technology - from data analytics to customer relationship management - is streamlining operations, improving customer experience and opening up new avenues for growth. Rather than abstract theory, the hosts share first-hand experience from the front line of the industry, offering practical, actionable insights and the occasional off-topic side-quest. 

Expect conversations that go beyond the obvious headlines. Alongside deep dives into specific technologies, regulatory challenges and emerging innovations, the podcast isn't afraid to draw on what's happening in the wider world - from the weather to major sporting events - and find the parallels with how businesses innovate, prepare and compete. 

Get ready to start Breaking the ICE -  a grounded, conversational approach that treats big industry questions with a light touch, making complex ideas accessible without oversimplifying them.

title: Bobby Logs Stories - Silly Adventures for Kids
author: Alasdair Tremblay-Birchall
description:
Otis and Huxley, who are human children, meet Bobby Logs, a turtle who has a lot of enemies because he used to be a meany at school. They help him fix gigantic problems, rescue all sorts of creatures and make amends with those he wronged in his past.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

title: The School Clarity Podcast
author: Rochelle Callard
description: The School Clarity Podcast helps parents confidently navigate their child’s education. Hosted by Rochelle Callard — former teacher, school principal, and education specialist — each episode delivers practical tools, clear explanations, and insider insights to help you understand school communication, support your child’s learning, and advocate effectively without conflict. No jargon. No judgment. Just clarity. Because when parents feel informed and confident, children achieve better outcomes. Clarity is the gift you give your child.

I would like to talk about things in my world from sports to relationships and i may learn a little from family and friends, and teaching a little to family and friends alone the way we may make each other life a little better.

title: Youth's Take Podcast
author: Land Justice Community School
description: A youth-led podcast exploring land justice, housing justice, culture, identity, organizing, and what it means to grow up in rapidly changing communities across Texas. Through storytelling, political education, and candid conversations, youth organizers, artists, and community leaders discuss environmental justice, gentrification, Indigenous identity, technology, displacement, and collective power while reclaiming narratives rooted in community, culture, and liberation.

title: Not Just a Dentist
author: Dr. Rob Raimondi, DDS and Dr. Marc Scalfani, DDS
description:
You don't think much about your teeth until something goes wrong. Then suddenly you're deep in a world of crowns, implants, bite alignment, and decisions that affect how you eat, speak, and feel for the next twenty years. Not Just a Dentist is here for exactly that moment, and for everything that leads up to it.
Hosted by Dr. Raimondi and Dr. Sclafani of One Manhattan Dental, this show goes past the routine cleaning and into the parts of dentistry most people never hear explained. How your mouth is wired into your whole-body health. What full-mouth restoration actually involves and who really needs it. Why cosmetic work is about function and confidence in equal measure. Why some jaw and TMJ pain gets dismissed for years before anyone actually fixes it. What's genuinely changing in the field, and what's just hype. And the questions patients always think of on the elevator ride home, too late to ask.
Each episode pairs the precision of specialist-level care with the kind of plain conversation you'd want from a dentist who has time to actually talk. You'll hear the stories too, the patients who got their bite, their confidence, and their willingness to smile in photos back after years of avoiding all three. Whether you're weighing a major restorative case, curious what separates a prosthodontist from a general dentist, or you just want to stop nodding along at appointments and start understanding your own mouth, you'll leave knowing more than when you arrived.
Subscribe wherever you listen.

Through these conversations, we explore the stories behind the success. The challenges, lessons, leadership experiences, personal growth, and defining moments that shaped each person's journey.

Because when we lead from the heart, everyone wins.

Welcome to Heart Centered Leaders

title: Navigating Toxic Relationships | Relationship Problems, Therapy, Relationship Indecision, Identity
author: Dr. Wendy Burchett, PsyD., Licensed Marriage and Family Therapist, Biblical Relationship Strategist and Addiction Specialist Coach
description:
Are you unhappy in a toxic Christian relationship or marriage and stuck because you are constantly waiting for him to change? Are you confused trying to discern God’s will for your relationship? Do you feel like you have lost the ability to feel emotionally safe in your marriage? Have you lost yourself because you are so focused on how to make your relationship work? 
I am so excited you are here! This podcast will help you create emotional safety, discover God’s will for your relationship, find yourself again, and choose faith over fear! 
Hello, I am Dr. Wendy Burchett, doctor of psychology and licensed marriage and family therapist. I am also a Christ follower who spent 20 years trying to figure out how to find my way out of toxic relationships and rediscover my identity to create a life I loved. 
I was stuck and confused about God’s will for me, waiting for others to change, hoping I was enough. I was afraid of staying and scared to death to leave. I finally realized if I wanted change I had to find safety for myself, quit waiting on others to change, and focus on building identity to move forward. 
I created a method to get unstuck in relationships and begin to build an identity in Christ that worked for me, while giving me freedom from anxiety, fear and toxicity. I can’t wait to share it with you! 
If you are ready to… 
Understand God’s will for your relationship
Take action without fear
Discover your identity 
Find emotional safety
And create an awesome plan for your future.. 
Then this podcast is for YOU! 
Grab some courage and your coffee! Let’s dive in!

This podcast includes audio versions of blog posts from Whitchurch & Associates, PLLC, including How to Divorce a Narcissist in Oklahoma. This episode explains how high-conflict behavior, manipulation, financial pressure, and parenting disputes can affect an Oklahoma divorce, and why documentation, temporary orders, and clear boundaries matter.

La pace non è solo l’assenza di guerra, è anche una scelta da portare avanti e costruire con le parole e con le azioni. Oggi più che mai, è una scelta urgente.

title: 中年オタクの憂鬱
author: 文化放送エクステンド
description:
気づけば仲間がオタ卒してたり。親の背中が小さく見えたり。
ふと夜中に孤独を感じたり──。
まだまだ現役中年オタクなあなたが抱える憂鬱を、声優・後藤邑子が受け止めます。
真面目な悩みから、取るに足らない小さなモヤモヤまで。チープでクールな中年たちに、禁則事項はありません。
聴けばちょっと気が晴れて、ちょっとユカイな明日がくる。
そんな耳のサードプレイス型・お悩み共有番組が「中年オタクの憂鬱」です。

番組では「中年オタクの憂鬱」を募集します。真面目な悩みから、取るに足らない小さなモヤモヤまで。オタクならではの「悩み」「失敗談」「困った話」など番組パーソナリティーの後藤邑子に聞いて欲しい話を送ってきてください。

title: The Villainz Lair
author: The Villainz Lair
description: Welcome to The Villain's Lair, the ultimate destination for deep-dive geek culture, cinematic analysis, and unfiltered conversations with the creators shaping our favorite worlds. Hosted by Emmy Award-winning producers, each episode pulls back the curtain on comic books, sci-fi, and entertainment news. From analyzing the complex psychology of modern cinema to exclusive, hard-hitting interviews with industry insiders, actors, and comic book artists, we break down the stories you love without the fluff. Step inside the lair—your weekly dose of pop culture insight starts here. DC & Marvel Fans!

title: The Mind of Us
author: Adelaide O
description: The Mind of Us explores the psychology behind everyday human experiences—overthinking, rejection, loneliness, relationships, identity, and more. Through research and reflection, each episode helps us better understand why we think, feel, and behave the way we do. Because sometimes, understanding ourselves helps us feel a little less alone. Follow to never miss an episode.

title: Vietnam Content Marketing
author: Seven Million Bikes Podcasts | Saigon Podcast Studio
description:
Vietnam is one of the fastest-changing markets in Asia. But reaching the people who live, work, and buy here takes more than simply translating an overseas campaign. 


Vietnam Content Marketing explores how brands, creators, and businesses build trust, grow audiences, and tell better stories in Vietnam. Through conversations with marketers, founders, and industry leaders, we uncover what works, what doesn't, and what connects with Vietnam consumers across social media, video, podcast, search, and beyond. 


It's practical, honest, and focused on the realities of doing business in this market. Whether you're building a local brand, entering Vietnam for the first time, or trying to understand where the industry is heading, this show gives you the ideas and insights to create content that actually makes an impact. 


I'm Niall Mackay from Seven Million Bikes Podcast and Saigon Podcast Studio, and this is Vietnam Content Marketing.

title: Small Biotechs; Big Decisions
author: Norstella
description:
A limited podcast series exploring the challenges and opportunities facing emerging biotech companies today. Hosted by Daniel Chancellor, VP of Thought Leadership at Norstella, and Claire Riches, VP of Clinical Solutions at Citeline, each episode shares the truth about the current biotech landscape covering market dynamics, regulatory shifts, and strategic decisions to help biotech leaders navigate uncertainties and drive innovation.

View the video series and find out more information here: www.citeline.com/biotech

title: Pleasure Is Not a Luxury — It's a Path to Abundance
author: Fay Savery
description:
Have you ever wondered why manifestation can feel exhausting, even when you're doing "all the right things"?
In this first episode of The Ecstatic Abundance Podcast, Fayannie shares the philosophy that inspired the Ecstatic Abundance Academy and explains why abundance isn't created through constant hustle—but through presence, embodiment, and learning how to receive.
Together we'll explore how your breath, your body, and your nervous system influence your relationship with prosperity, creativity, and joy.
This episode is an invitation to slow down.

title: Arewa Beauty Talk
author: Elizabeth
description: A beauty and wellness podcast covering skincare, makeup, hair care, fitness, confidence, and self-care for women who want to look and feel their best.

title: Christ Alone Ammon
author: Christ Alone Lutheran Church
description:
Sermon podcasts of Christ Alone Lutheran Church, located in Ammon, Idaho. 
For more information, visit christaloneidaho.org!

title: Rise & Stride, Mama
author: Susan Ammons
description:
Rise & Stride, Mama
Every Tide, Every Stride, and Every Mama.

Motherhood is a journey filled with changing tides, unexpected turns, and countless moments of growth. Join hosts Susan Ammons and guests as they dive into honest conversations about motherhood, womanhood, personal growth, and navigating life's seasons with grace and resilience.

From the joys and challenges of raising children to rediscovering yourself, building community, pursuing passions, and embracing change, Rise & Stride, Mama is a place where every story matters and every mama belongs.

Whether you're rocking a newborn, cheering from the sidelines, navigating an empty nest, or finding your footing through a new chapter, this podcast offers encouragement, inspiration, and connection for every tide, every stride, and every mama.

title: Công Ty Sơn Mỹ Thuật Conpa
author: công ty sơn nghệ thuật Conpa
description:
CONPA được hình thành từ niềm đam mê với vật liệu hoàn thiện và mong muốn mang đến những trải nghiệm mới cho không gian kiến trúc. Chúng tôi không xem bức tường chỉ là một bề mặt, mà là yếu tố góp phần tạo nên cảm xúc, cá tính và giá trị của mỗi công trình. Vì vậy, CONPA tập trung nghiên cứu và phát triển các dòng sơn hiệu ứng có khả năng tái hiện vẻ đẹp của bê tông, đá và những chất liệu tự nhiên theo cách tinh tế và hiện đại hơn.
Mỗi dự án là một hành trình sáng tạo, nơi chúng tôi lắng nghe ý tưởng của khách hàng, thấu hiểu ngôn ngữ thiết kế và chuyển hóa chúng thành những bề mặt mang dấu ấn riêng. Từ những không gian sống tối giản đến các công trình thương mại đòi hỏi tính thẩm mỹ cao, CONPA luôn hướng đến sự chỉn chu trong từng chi tiết, sự bền vững trong từng giải pháp và sự hài lòng trong từng trải nghiệm.

title: The Exit Series
author: Bob Roark
description:
The conversations that happen after the wire — for the founders who sold, and the brokers and M&A attorneys who got them there.
Most podcasts celebrate how founders built their companies. The Exit Series documents what happened after they sold — the identity shift, the financial decisions that couldn't wait, the year nobody warned them about.
Founders tell the real story of life after the exit. Brokers, M&A attorneys, and exit planners put their expertise on the record before owners need them.
Hosted by Bob Roark. theexitseries.com

title: The Way Up with Dimitri Christou
author: dimitri3
description: A show committed to conversations that bring forth the raising of collective humanities access to freedom, vitality, possibility and abundance.

title: Energy Dialogues
author: Energy Dialogues
description:
Hosting extraordinary dialogue that is timely, relevant, and significant by focusing on the global scale of energy, right down to the micro details.

The aim is to have strategic dialogue, welcoming diverse viewpoints from participants within and outside the industry, as well as the formation of solutions driving a sustainable energy pathway forward, critical amidst an on-going energy transition.

In this podcast, energy thought leaders discuss relevant and timely topics impacting the energy industry.

title: Get Real Rae... Real Business & Life Advice
author: Rae Wilson
description: Being a Solopreneur is hard. Life is hard. And if you can hardly stand another podcast where the host makes everything sound easy breezy, another interview where it seems like everyone except you  is making millions, then this Podcast is for you.

title: Inside My Mind
author: Dr. D Joe Payne
description:
Inside My Mind isn't just another opinion podcast. Every week, we step back from the endless cycle of headlines to explore the ideas, values, and beliefs shaping our culture.
Every headline is the result of an idea. Every idea has a history. Every history has a lesson.
Long before today's political battles, cultural confusion, and social division, there were ideas that shaped our nation, our communities, and our families. Somewhere along the way, many of those ideas were forgotten—or intentionally replaced.
From politics and government to faith, family, education, history, and everyday life, we'll examine today's biggest issues through the lens of yesterday's timeless principles. We'll separate facts from narratives, challenge popular assumptions, and ask the questions too many people are afraid to ask.
Whether you agree with every conclusion or not, you'll leave every episode thinking more deeply than when you started.
Because today's headlines didn't happen overnight. They were built on yesterday's ideas.

title: THE NEXT SHOT PODCAST
author: nextshot podcast
description:
⛳ The Next Shot
🎙️ Podcasts | Golf Stories | Lifestyle | Networking | Experiences
Where golf meets lifestyle, culture, business, travel & real conversations.
From the course to the clubhouse, we explore the game beyond the swing — stories, people, style, mindset, networking and the new generation shaping golf culture.
Whether you’re a seasoned golfer, curious beginner, entrepreneur, or just love elevated lifestyle content — this is your next shot.
Join the society.

title: आज की राजनीती और देश
author: Moti Singh Rathore
description:
🎙️ पॉडकास्ट लेख – “राजनीति और देश”

प्रस्तावना (Intro):
"नमस्कार दोस्तों, स्वागत है आपका हमारे पॉडकास्ट में। आज का विषय है – राजनीति और देश। राजनीति केवल सत्ता की कुर्सी का खेल नहीं है, बल्कि यह उस व्यवस्था का नाम है जो हमारे देश की दिशा और दशा तय करती है। जब हम राजनीति को समझते हैं, तो असल में हम अपने देश के भविष्य को समझते हैं।"

मुख्य भाग (Body):
"हमारा देश भारत – दुनिया का सबसे बड़ा लोकतंत्र। यहाँ हर नागरिक को वोट देने का अधिकार है, अपनी आवाज़ उठाने का हक़ है। लेकिन सवाल यह है कि क्या हम राजनीति को सिर्फ नेताओं और पार्टियों तक सीमित मानते हैं?

राजनीति केवल संसद या विधानसभा में नहीं होती। यह हर जगह होती है – पंचायत से लेकर नगर निगम तक, गाँव की चौपाल से लेकर सोशल मीडिया तक। राजनीति हमारे स्कूल, कॉलेज, दफ्तर और यहां तक कि घर तक प्रभावित करती है।

कहा जाता है – 'अगर अच्छे लोग राजनीति से दूर रहेंगे, तो बुरे लोग राजनीति पर कब्जा कर लेंगे।' इसलिए राजनीति से भागना नहीं, बल्कि उसमें जागरूक भागीदारी करना ही सच्ची देशसेवा है।

आज देश को ऐसी राजनीति चाहिए जो विकास, शिक्षा, रोज़गार और समान अवसरों पर केंद्रित हो। जाति, धर्म और भाषा की दीवारों से ऊपर उठकर हमें ऐसी राजनीति को बढ़ावा देना होगा जो आने वाली पीढ़ियों के लिए मज़बूत नींव तैयार करे।"

समापन (Conclusion):
"तो दोस्तों, राजनीति केवल नेताओं का काम नहीं – यह हर उस नागरिक का कर्तव्य है जो अपने देश से प्रेम करता है। याद रखिए, आपका एक वोट, आपकी एक राय, आपके देश का भविष्य बदल सकती है।

आइए, राजनीति को समझें, देश के लिए सोचें और एक जिम्मेदार नागरिक की तरह आगे बढ़ें। क्योंकि – देश हमसे है और हम देश से हैं।"

🎧 Outro Line:
"अगर आपको यह एपिसोड अच्छा लगा हो तो इसे ज़रूर शेयर करें और हमें अपने विचार बताएं। अगली बार फिर मिलेंगे एक नए विषय के साथ। जय हिंद!"

title: The Shelf Help Podcast
author: Toni Jones
description:
The Shelf Help Podcast is the audio home of Shelf Help, the global self-help book club and community helping readers use self-help, not just read it.
Each week, journalist and bibliotherapist Toni Jones talks to a different author about books, self-discovery, life design and everyday tools to help you understand yourself better.
Because what she's learned from a reading over 1000 personal development books is that self-help isn’t about fixing yourself. Or even changing yourself. It’s about getting to know yourself, so you can design a life that fits.

title: KCR Openbare Dialoog
author: Kenniscentrum Cultuuronderwijs Rotterdam KCR
description: Het Kenniscentrum Cultuuronderwijs Rotterdam organiseert jaarlijks meerdere publieksprogramma's over actuele thema's binnen het cultuuronderwijs in Rotterdam. Deze programma's vormen samen de openbare dialoog; het doorlopende gesprek dat KCR voert met het onderwijs, de cultuursector en de stad als geheel.
